stemHtml: Light aircraft commonly use a stall warning system which works using an audible warning controlled by a micro-switch triggered by…

options.a: An angle of attack sensor on the side of the aircraft fuselage.
options.b: The pressure drop in the pitot pressure system at low IAS.
options.c: A vane in the airflow near the leading edge of the wing.
options.d: Turbulence hitting a vane on the horizontal stabiliser.
